organized_notes.text: SPY attempting to bounce off 50 SMA
note SPY 50 SMA is less significant as it has been broken many times recently
long AAPL @ 326.83, 2 shares - nice RS today and D1, strong bounce off D1 8 EMA, missed the entry as i got greedy, but did well to not chase and wait for a retest [TRADE: long AAPL @ 326.83 x2]

i took a long as i am view this strong break above HOD on SPY as bullish and i am expecting this pullback to be reversed quickly - i did not notice SPY hitting D1 8/15 EMA resistance which was a mistake - watch closely for signs of resistance #flag
partial exit AAPL long @ 329.10, 1 share - this was an accidental exit intending to set a stop, but i am okay with taking the partial profits and swinging the rest [TRADE: exit AAPL long @ 329.1 x1]
banks strong - looks like a good time to enter if i wasn't already in JPM long #sector
long JPM @ 344.99, 1 share - #ptrade , paper trade, very visible sector strength here [TRADE: long JPM @ 344.99 x1]
